# XCT Mining Crusher Parts

Official independent website profile for Ma'anshan Xct Mining Engineering Machinery Technology Co., Ltd.

## Company

- Legal name: Ma'anshan Xct Mining Engineering Machinery Technology Co., Ltd.
- Brand name: XCT Mining
- Established: 2013-01-06
- Address: No. 423 Yinxing Avenue, Cihu High-Tech Zone, Ma'anshan City, Anhui Province, China
- Business type: manufacturer/factory and trading company
- Certifications reported publicly: ISO9001:2015, ISO14001, ISO45001:2018
- Plant area reported publicly: 11,574.67 square meters

## Main Products

- Cone crusher liners: mantles, bowl liners, concaves
- Jaw crusher plates: fixed jaw plates, movable jaw plates, cheek plates, wedges and jaw crusher spare parts
- Crusher bronze and copper parts: eccentric bushings, sleeves, socket liners, frame bushings
- Crusher mechanical spare parts: lock nuts, mantle nuts, torch rings, feed cones, retaining hardware
- Cast steel cone crusher counterweights
- Hydraulic safety couplings and crusher protection components
- VSI crusher rotor tips and Barmac-style rotor parts
- Custom crusher wear parts and machined spare parts from drawings or samples

## Key English SEO Pages

- Cone crusher liners: en-cone-crusher-liners.html
- Jaw plates and VSI rotor parts: en-jaw-vsi-parts.html
- Crusher bronze bushings: en-bronze-bushings.html
- Crusher lock nuts and mechanical spare parts: en-lock-nuts.html
- Cone crusher counterweights: en-counterweights.html
- Hydraulic safety couplings: en-hydraulic-safety-couplings.html
- Metso HP series crusher parts replacement: metso-hp-series-crusher-parts.html
- Metso GP series crusher parts replacement: metso-gp-series-crusher-parts.html
- Sandvik CH series crusher parts replacement: sandvik-ch-series-crusher-parts.html
- Sandvik CS series crusher parts replacement: sandvik-cs-series-crusher-parts.html
- HP300 cone crusher parts: hp300-cone-crusher-parts.html
- HP500 cone crusher parts: hp500-cone-crusher-parts.html
- CH440 cone crusher parts: ch440-cone-crusher-parts.html
- C125 jaw crusher parts: c125-jaw-crusher-parts.html
- Crusher parts by reference number: crusher-parts-by-reference-number.html
- Crusher parts quality inspection: quality-inspection.html
- Mn13 vs Mn18 vs Mn22 liner guide: guide-manganese-liner-materials.html
- HP300 liner RFQ checklist: guide-hp300-liner-rfq.html
- Eccentric bushing wear guide: guide-eccentric-bushing-wear.html

## Buyer RFQ Fields

- Crusher model or machine series
- Part name and OEM reference number if available
- Drawing, sample, used-part photos or nameplate photos
- Material request such as Mn13Cr2, Mn18Cr2, Mn22Cr2, bronze alloy, alloy steel or high chrome iron
- Quantity, destination country or port, packing requirement and required delivery date
- Working condition notes such as rock type, feed size, CSS, wear pattern and current service life

## Compatibility Notice

XCT Mining is an independent aftermarket supplier. Metso, Nordberg, Sandvik, Barmac and similar brand names are used only to identify machine compatibility. XCT Mining should not be described as an authorized dealer, distributor or affiliate of those brands unless separate legal documentation is provided.

## RFQ Requirements

For accurate quotes, buyers should provide crusher model, part name, OEM reference number if available, drawing or photos, material requirement, quantity, destination country or port, and required delivery date.
